name: Iso11783OPLoadVersion
title: Iso11783OPLoadVersion
syntax: long Iso11783OPLoadVersion( dword ecuHandle, char versionName[] );
description: The function loads an object pool, which is stored on the Virtual Terminal. A Load Version command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)
